response.global_analysis: Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the song 'Figure It Out' starting at 02:56, though the JSON is partial; I am transcribing the subsequent verses from the audio. The video begins with an introductory talk segment (English/Japanese), transitions into a promotional video for 'The Royaltea' (English audio with matching hardcoded subtitles), and concludes with a live concert performance. Timings are tightly aligned with vocal activation to ensure precision.

subtitles.original: ...first time doing this genre, so I'm a little bit shy.
subtitles.english: ...first time doing this genre, so I'm a little bit shy.

subtitles.english: It's a little bit different from what I usually sing, so...

subtitles.english: ...I hope you guys can, even if...

subtitles.english: ...if it could resonate with you guys even for a little, I would be so happy.

subtitles.original: こんなジャンルの曲をするの、初めてでした。
subtitles.english: It's my first time performing a song in this genre.

subtitles.original: だからね、ちょっとシャイです。
subtitles.english: So, I'm a bit shy.

subtitles.original: Yeah, well, basically, well, being placed in a box you don't exactly fit... it sucks, right?
subtitles.english: Yeah, well, basically, well, being placed in a box you don't exactly fit... it sucks, right?

subtitles.original: And this is some sort of, you know, it's a song of self-acceptance.
subtitles.english: And this is some sort of, you know, it's a song of self-acceptance.

subtitles.original: And sometimes your flaws are what makes you you.
subtitles.english: And sometimes your flaws are what makes you you.

subtitles.original: And even if you're broken, it's fine.
subtitles.english: And even if you're broken, it's fine.

subtitles.original: And no one else's opinions should change that.
subtitles.english: And no one else's opinions should change that.

subtitles.original: とにかく、自分をありのままを愛していいよって曲です。
subtitles.english: Anyway, it's a song about how it's okay to love yourself just as you are.

subtitles.original: じゃ、あの、これから準備するので待っててね。
subtitles.english: Well then, I'm going to get ready now, so please wait.

subtitles.original: Please wait, 'cause I'm gonna prepare. I got a surprise!
subtitles.english: Please wait, 'cause I'm gonna prepare. I got a surprise!

subtitles.original: Yay! Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Yay! Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: Attention please!
subtitles.english: Attention please!

subtitles.original: Are you somebody looking for a new experience?
subtitles.english: Are you somebody looking for a new experience?

subtitles.original: Or are you by any chance a MERAKyats...
subtitles.english: Or are you by any chance a MERAKyats...

subtitles.original: ...who just can't wait for when I'm going to be implementing a certain feature?
subtitles.english: ...who just can't wait for when I'm going to be implementing a certain feature?

subtitles.original: Or are you simply wanting to get a head start with flexing...
subtitles.english: Or are you simply wanting to get a head start with flexing...

subtitles.original: ...using super amazing badges and cute emojis?
subtitles.english: ...using super amazing badges and cute emojis?

subtitles.original: Well, you're in luck!
subtitles.english: Well, you're in luck!

subtitles.english: My name is Pavolia Reine,

subtitles.english: and I'm going to be here explaining briefly

subtitles.original: At The Royaltea,

subtitles.original: our super advanced magical technology grants you badge flexing rights,
subtitles.english: our super advanced magical technology grants you badge flexing rights,

subtitles.original: which you can constantly show off every time you're here with us.
subtitles.english: which you can constantly show off every time you're here with us.

subtitles.english: by granting you a one-of-a-kind experience with cute emojis.
